spots.title: Wire the manifest → SDK config spot
spots.prompt:
Your task is to implement the three helper functions that translate the deployment manifest into DeepBook SDK configuration objects.

You are targeting the {{ pool_subset }} pool(s). The functions are:
- `packageIds(m)` — extract DEEPBOOK_PACKAGE_ID, REGISTRY_ID, DEEP_TREASURY_ID
- `coinMap(m)` — build the CoinMap for DEEP, SUI, USDC
- `poolMap(m)` — build the PoolMap for DEEP_SUI and SUI_USDC

Implement these at lines 39-58 of `src/App.tsx` using the manifest shape shown in the Manifest interface above.
